response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development, leadership, and infrastructure, but his background leans heavily toward web and mobile development with limited direct experience in large-scale cloud compute platforms, distributed systems at scale, or C++ for infrastructure-heavy roles. While he demonstrates strong technical skills and mentorship, his resume lacks clear evidence of working on internal cloud platforms or handling compute/storage/hardware architecture as required.
strengths: Strong leadership and mentorship experience, with roles in technical leadership and training (e.g., Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos).
Proven ability to build and scale systems (e.g., micro-services infrastructure handling millions of requests/sec, Kubernetes deployments).
Diverse technical expertise across languages (C++, D, JavaScript/TypeScript) and systems (cloud, embedded, GIS).
concerns: Limited direct experience with C++ for large-scale infrastructure or cloud compute platforms (most C++ roles were for IDEs or embedded systems).
No explicit experience with cloud architecture balancing short- and long-term needs or production-level cloud systems.
Resume focuses more on web/mobile development and does not highlight compute/storage/hardware architecture or distributed systems at cloud scale.
